platforms.name: Bandcamp Artist Store Direct-to-Fan Upload Route
platforms.manual_review_reason: Artist account, upload, rights ownership, pricing, release metadata, payout and content-policy review required.

platforms.name: SoundCloud Creator Upload and Artist Discovery Route
platforms.manual_review_reason: Account access, upload settings, rights confirmation, profile configuration and current terms review required.

platforms.name: Audiomack Creator Upload and Emerging Artist Route
platforms.manual_review_reason: Creator account, upload, ownership, monetization eligibility and platform policy review required.

platforms.name: SoundOn by TikTok Artist Distribution Route
platforms.manual_review_reason: Account, territory eligibility, copyright ownership, distribution conflict and payout review required.

platforms.name: TIDAL Upload Independent Artist Self-Publishing Route
platforms.manual_review_reason: Eligibility, territory, ownership, copyright compliance and no-royalty upload terms review required.

platforms.name: ReverbNation Artist Opportunities and Profile Route
platforms.manual_review_reason: Artist account, EPK/profile setup, opportunity selection, possible fees, deadlines and rights terms review required.

platforms.name: Subvert.fm Cooperative Music Marketplace Artist Route
platforms.manual_review_reason: Member alpha access, cooperative membership, storefront terms and platform-readiness review required.

platforms.name: Mikseri.net Independent Music Upload Community Route
platforms.manual_review_reason: Finnish-language registration, upload format, licensing and community rules require manual review.
